certifications.reg_description: Safety requirements for low-voltage commercial electrical installations.

findings.finding: Circuit labeling was complete and legible at all inspected panels.
findings.rule_description: Electrical panels must be clearly labeled.

findings.finding: Emergency shutoff access was unobstructed at the time of inspection.
findings.rule_description: Emergency shutoff devices must remain accessible.

certifications.reg_description: Safety requirements for low-voltage commercial electrical installations.

findings.finding: Cable tray covers were secured and showed no visible damage in the inspected area.
findings.rule_description: Installed cable systems must remain protected from accidental contact or damage.
